en_title: Dead Space Creator Glen Schofield Announces Retirement From Gaming Industry
cn_title: 《死亡空间》创始人Glen Schofield宣布退休
subtitle: 结束35年游戏行业一线工作
opus_summary: 《死亡空间》创作者Glen Schofield宣布退出游戏行业的日常工作。他35年的职业生涯还包括共同创办Sledgehammer Games、参与《使命召唤》系列并执掌《木卫四协议》。

paragraphs.en: creator Glen Schofield has announced his retirement from the "day to day work" of the gaming industry.
paragraphs.cn: [原文开头缺失内容]创作者Glen Schofield宣布退休，不再参与游戏行业的「日常工作」。

paragraphs.en: Schofield took to LinkedIn to break the news with an emotional video, thanking his fans, colleagues, and the industry for supporting him throughout his career. He also took a moment to acknowledge that, although the industry is experiencing a lot of hardships right now, there are still great minds making great games.
paragraphs.cn: Schofield在LinkedIn发布一段充满感情的视频公布消息，感谢粉丝、同事和整个行业在其职业生涯中给予的支持。他也特别指出，尽管行业目前正经历诸多困难，仍有杰出人才在制作优秀游戏。

paragraphs.en: Schofield didn't give an explicit reason for his retirement, but he has had a successful 35-year run in the industry. After beginning as an artist, Schofield climbed the ranks before becoming a producer at EA, where he contributed to James Bond and Lord of the Rings games. After his work on Bond, EA gave him the freedom to create a brand-new IP: Dead Space. With the team at Visceral Games, Schofield built one of the scariest video games ever created, and its impact has had a lasting ripple effect. Although it took inspiration from titles like Resident Evil, it was fresh, unique, and most importantly, utterly terrifying.
paragraphs.cn: Schofield没有明确说明退休原因，但他已在行业中成功奋斗35年。他从美术师起步，一路晋升为EA制作人，参与过詹姆斯·邦德和《指环王》游戏。在完成邦德项目后，EA给予他创作全新IP的自由，这便是《死亡空间》。Schofield与Visceral Games团队打造了史上最恐怖的游戏之一，其影响延续至今。虽然作品从《生化危机》等游戏汲取灵感，但它新鲜、独特，最重要的是极其恐怖。

paragraphs.en: Following the game's success, Activision recruited Schofield to co-found Sledgehammer Games with his Visceral Games colleague, Michael Condrey. The two worked on a third-person Call of Duty game set in Vietnam for six months before eventually being asked to help co-develop Call of Duty: Modern Warfare 3 after Infinity Ward imploded in 2010. Despite being very new to the franchise as a creative, Sledgehammer Games helped Infinity Ward deliver a highly successful trilogy capper that also solidified Sledgehammer as one of the core Call of Duty teams.
paragraphs.cn: 该作成功后，动视招募Schofield与其在Visceral Games的同事迈克尔·康德里（Michael Condrey）共同创办Sledgehammer Games。两人曾用六个月开发一款以越南为背景的第三人称《使命召唤》，但2010年Infinity Ward发生剧变后，他们最终受邀协助联合开发《使命召唤：现代战争3》。尽管在创意层面对这个系列还很陌生，Sledgehammer Games仍帮助Infinity Ward交出了一部大获成功的三部曲收官作，也由此确立了自己作为《使命召唤》核心团队之一的地位。

paragraphs.en: Schofield went on to lead the development on the innovative, though notably divisive Call of Duty: Advanced Warfare before taking the franchise back to its roots with Call of Duty: WWII in 2017. Schofield eventually departed from Sledgehammer and went back to his own roots with The Callisto Protocol, a Dead Space-inspired sci-fi horror game. It was the last game Schofield helmed, though he made efforts to pitch a fourth Dead Space game to EA around the time of the 2023 remake of the first game.
paragraphs.cn: 此后，Schofield领导开发了颇具创新但评价明显两极化的《使命召唤：高级战争》，又在2017年通过《使命召唤：二战》让系列回归本源。Schofield最终离开Sledgehammer，并凭借受《死亡空间》启发的科幻恐怖游戏《木卫四协议》回归自己的创作根源。这是他执掌的最后一款游戏，不过在初代《死亡空间》2023年重制版推出前后，他曾尝试向EA提案《死亡空间4》。

paragraphs.en: Schofield contributed a lot to the gaming industry through not only his games, but also his desire to let creativity triumph. His contributions will be missed, but his impact will be felt for years to come.
paragraphs.cn: Schofield对游戏行业的贡献不仅来自他的作品，也来自他让创意取胜的愿望。人们会怀念他的贡献，而他的影响还将延续多年。
